# Tobias Riss

> Medical engineering researcher, entrepreneur, and builder. Currently a visiting researcher at Stanford University working on AI models for robotic medical imaging with Siemens Healthineers.

## Philosophy

Start by curiosity. Flourish by indulgence.

## Background

- M.Sc. Biomedical Engineering and Medical Physics at Technical University of Munich (specializing in imaging technologies, radiation physics, and medical AI)
- B.Sc. Medical Technology (double degree), University of Tuebingen / University of Stuttgart
- Visiting Researcher at Stanford University: predictive models for robotic spine X-ray imaging optimization
- Research Year at Siemens Healthineers: AI models for medical imaging
- R&D X-Ray Physics at Siemens Healthineers: iron quantification in photon-counting CT, spectral behavior of contrast materials
- Visiting Investment Analyst at UnternehmerTUM: technical and market due diligence for pre-seed deep tech investments
- Co-Founder of AIM Innovate: a program teaching students in Germany how to take an idea to a certified product on the market
- Consulting projects at Alfred Kaercher SE and Proservation (startup)
- R&D Software and Hardware Development at Ovesco Endoscopy AG
- Process Equipment Engineering at CureVac AG
- Winner of Healthcare Hackathon Bayern 2024: AI motion-tracking system for early prediction of addictive behavior

## Interests

- AI-based classification and preprocessing of unstructured medical data
- Generative Engine Optimization for personal brands
- AI for drug discovery and closed-loop autonomous research
- Software and robotics projects
- Entrepreneurship and bringing ideas to market

## Contact

- Email: tobias.riss01@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/tobias-ri%C3%9F-92a96b181
- Website: https://tobiasriss.com

- [Fascinations](https://tobiasriss.com/fascinations.html): Deep dives into topics like AI for drug development, including a full Stanford class report
- [Thoughts](https://tobiasriss.com/thoughts.html): Unpolished reflections
